summary: ZCF (Zero-Config Code Flow) provides a streamlined, one-click setup for integrating AI coding tools like Claude Code and Codex, enabling developers to enhance their coding workflow with minimal configuration. It aims to simplify the use of intelligent agent systems and personalized AI assistants for coding tasks.
use_cases: quickly set up AI coding tools for a new project
update workflows in an existing coding environment
switch interface languages for bilingual development teams
